name: WAI-ARIA APG Tree View Pattern
notes: Defines tree view as a hierarchical list with expandable and collapsible items, single-select and multi-select models, focus distinct from selection, Right and Left Arrow expansion behavior, Up and Down movement, typeahead, aria-activedescendant support, aria-multiselectable, aria-selected or aria-checked state, labels, and dynamic-loading requirements for aria-level, aria-setsize, and aria-posinset.
